basic_details.job_title: Kendriya Vidyalaya Balasore Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Walkin for TGT and ATL/ Vocational Instructor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya No. 1, Balasore, Odisha - 756001
basic_details.post_name: TGT (English, Maths, Social Science, Special Educator) and ATL/Vocational Instructor (ATL Lab Instructor)
basic_details.application_mode: Download form from Vidyalaya website and appear directly for walk-in interview
basic_details.short_information: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya No. 1, Balasore (Odisha - 756001) has released a walk-in-interview notification for the academic session 2026-27 to prepare a panel of Part-Time Contractual Teachers (TGT) and an ATL/Vocational Instructor. All these engagements are purely contractual, part-time, and on a day-to-day basis. The walk-in interview will be held on 25 July 2026 (Saturday) from 8:00 AM onwards at the Vidyalaya premises. This article covers every detail available in the official notification - eligibility, salary, important dates, documents required, and the application process - exactly as

important_dates.raw: Date of Interview: 25 July 2026 (Saturday) Registration Time: 8:00 AM to 9:00 AM (no registration accepted after 9:00 AM) Interview Time: 8:00 AM onwards Panel Display: Within 10 days after the interview, on the Vidyalaya website

age_limit.details: The age limit for all advertised posts - TGT (English, Maths, Social Science), Special Educator, and ATL Instructor - is not exceeding 65 years. The application form also asks candidates to state their exact age (in years, months, and days) as on 31 March 2026.

qualification.details: Eligibility differs by post. Candidates are advised to verify complete Recruitment Rules on the official KVS website, as instructed in the notification itself. | Age Limit: Not exceeding 65 years Essential Qualification: As per KVS Recruitment Rules Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Applications; proficiency in teaching through Hindi and English | Age Limit: Not exceeding 65 years Essential Qualification: As per KVS Recruitment Rules (refer to the official KVS website for qualification details) Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Applications; working knowledge of English and Hindi | Age Limit: Not exceeding 65 years Essential Qualification: B.E/ B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering Desirable: Minimum one year of experience in the relevant field; knowledge of Computer Applications; proficiency in teaching through Hindi and English

salary_details.details: The remuneration is fixed on a monthly basis as per the post applied for, as stated in the official bilingual notice: | No TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance) will be paid to candidates for attending the interview. Selected candidates cannot claim regularisation or any benefits available to regular employees.

selection_process: Selection is through a walk-in interview only. The notification does not mention any written test
or demo class as part of the process. Key points on selection:

Candidates must register between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM on the interview date; no registration is entertained after 9:00 AM. Merely attending the interview does not confer appointment. A panel of selected/waitlisted candidates will be displayed on the Vidyalaya website within 10 days of the interview. The Chairman
reserves the right to cancel the interview or the panel at any stage. Any candidate found canvassing will have their candidature cancelled.
how_to_apply: This is a walk-in-interview recruitment, not an online application process. Steps to apply, as per the notification:
Visit the official Vidyalaya website: https://balasore.kvs.ac.in/
Download the "Application Form for Part-Time Contractual Teachers & Vocational Experts."
Fill the form in capital letters only. Use a separate form for each post if applying for more than one post.
Attach self-attested copies of all testimonials with each form.
Do not send the form by Registered Post/Speed Post/Courier - it is not required.
Report in person to PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya No. 1, Balasore on 25 July 2026, between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM for registration, carrying the filled form and all documents.
Attend the walk-in interview on the same day.
important_instructions: All appointments are purely contractual, part-time, and on a day-to-day basis. Engagement will continue till the end of the academic session or till a regular teacher joins the post, whichever is earlier. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Attending the interview does not confer any right to appointment. The panel will be displayed on the official website within 10 days of the interview. No canvassing is allowed; canvassing will lead to cancellation of candidature. The Chairman, VMC, reserves all rights to cancel the interview or the panel. For posts not covered in the Recruitment Rules, the criteria mentioned in the notification itself apply as reference. Selected candidates cannot claim regularisation or benefits given to regular employees.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Balasore Recruitment 2026Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is through a walk-in interview only. The notification does not mention any written test, skill test, or demo class as part of the process. Key points on selection: Candidates must register between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM on the interview date; no registration is entertained after 9:00 AM. Merely attending the interview does not confer appointment. A panel of selected/waitlisted candidates will be displayed on the Vidyalaya website within 10 days of the interview. The Chairman, VMC (Vidyalaya Management Committee), reserves the right to cancel the interview or the panel at any stage. Any candidate found canvassing will have their candidature cancelled.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Balasore Recruitment 2026 Required Documents
content_sections.text: Based on the application form and notification instructions, candidates should carry: Duly filled application form (in capital letters, one form per post applied for) Self-attested photocopies of all educational and professional testimonials/certificates Recent passport-size photograph (to be pasted on the form) Original certificates for verification (as is standard practice for walk-in interviews; carry originals along with self-attested copies) Proof of teaching experience, if applicable CTET or equivalent certificate, if qualified (mandatory to attach if applicable, as per the form)

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Balasore Recruitment 2026 How to Apply
content_sections.text: This is a walk-in-interview recruitment, not an online application process. Steps to apply, as per the notification: Visit the official Vidyalaya website: https://balasore.kvs.ac.in/ Download the "Application Form for Part-Time Contractual Teachers & Vocational Experts." Fill the form in capital letters only. Use a separate form for each post if applying for more than one post. Attach self-attested copies of all testimonials with each form. Do not send the form by Registered Post/Speed Post/Courier - it is not required. Report in person to PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya No. 1, Balasore on 25 July 2026, between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM for registration, carrying the filled form and all documents. Attend the walk-in interview on the same day.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Balasore Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: All appointments are purely contractual, part-time, and on a day-to-day basis. Engagement will continue till the end of the academic session or till a regular teacher joins the post, whichever is earlier. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Attending the interview does not confer any right to appointment. The panel will be displayed on the official website within 10 days of the interview. No canvassing is allowed; canvassing will lead to cancellation of candidature. The Chairman, VMC, reserves all rights to cancel the interview or the panel. For posts not covered in the Recruitment Rules, the criteria mentioned in the notification itself apply as reference. Selected candidates cannot claim regularisation or benefits given to regular employees.

faq.question: Q1. What is the date of the KV No. 1 Balasore walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 25 July 2026 (Saturday), starting at 8:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the registration time for the KV Balasore walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Registration starts at 8:00 AM and closes at 9:00 AM on the interview date. No registration is accepted after 9:00 AM.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are being filled through this KV Balasore recruitment?
faq.answer: TGT (English, Mathematics, Social Science, Special Educator) and ATL/Vocational Instructor (ATL Lab Instructor).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the TGT post at PM SHRI KV Balasore?
faq.answer: The monthly remuneration for TGT posts (English, Maths, Social Science, Special Educator) is Rs. 26,250/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the ATL Instructor post at KV Balasore?
faq.answer: The monthly remuneration for the ATL/Vocational Instructor post is Rs. 30,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for KV Balasore TGT and ATL Instructor recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for all advertised posts is not exceeding 65 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification required for the ATL Instructor post?
faq.answer: A B.E. or B.Tech degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering is the essential qualification, with at least one year of relevant experience desirable.
